message:
feat(tantivy_ingest): Cx-first run (AppendLog path) (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Follow-on to tick 52. Adds the AppendLog-only parallel of
`run_with_reader_with_cx`.

Addition (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `IncrementalIndexer::run_with_cx(cx, storage)` — Cx-first
    parallel of `run`. Same cancellation-safety structure as
    tick 52's `run_with_reader_with_cx`:
      - `cx.checkpoint()?` at the top (pre-cancelled cx returns
        before AppendLogReader is opened).
      - `cx.checkpoint()?` at the start of each batch iteration,
        embedding `final_ordinal` in the error so a cancelled
        caller knows where the indexer got to.
      - Storage checkpoint commit inside the loop body fires
        BEFORE the next iteration's top-of-body checkpoint, so a
        mid-run cancel leaves the committed checkpoint consistent
        with the last fully-indexed batch.

Error variant on cancellation is `IndexerError::Config` (reusing
the existing variant to avoid introducing a new enum variant in
this strictly-additive tick). A future dedicated
`IndexerError::Cancelled` variant could carry the offset directly
once the cx-first surface has more consumers.

Regression test (new) `run_with_cx_matches_legacy`:

  * Mirrors the tick-52 `run_with_reader_with_cx_matches_legacy`
    topology exactly (4 sample events, separate consumer_ids for
    legacy vs cx runs, MockIndexWriter on each).
  * Asserts IndexerRunResult parity across every deterministic
    field: events_read, events_indexed, events_skipped, caught_up,
    final_ordinal, batches_committed.
  * Sanity check: events_indexed > 0 so the assertion isn't
    vacuously true.

With tick 53, both `IncrementalIndexer` public run entry points
(`run` via AppendLog, `run_with_reader` via backend-neutral
cursor) have Cx-first siblings with checkpointed batch-loop
seams. Legacy paths remain unchanged.

Verification (local fork bypass, CC=llvm clang,
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):
  * tantivy_ingest:: — 122 passed / 0 failed (tick 52: 121 ->
    tick 53: 122, +1 new parity test)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
